name: @gristlabs/grist-widget
description: A repository of grist custom widgets that have no back-end requirements.

scripts.build: yarn install --frozen-lockfile && git submodule update --init --recursive && tsc --build && node ./buildtools/publish.js manifest.json
scripts.dev:
echo 'Starting local server and watching for changes.
Start Grist with an environmental variable GRIST_WIDGET_LIST_URL=http://localhost:8585/manifest.json' && concurrently -k "npm run watch 1> /dev/null" "npm run serve:dev"
scripts.test: docker image inspect gristlabs/grist --format 'gristlabs/grist image present' && NODE_PATH=_build SELENIUM_BROWSER=chrome node ./node_modules/mocha/bin/_mocha -g "${GREP_TESTS}" _build/test/*.js
scripts.test:debug: node ./buildtools/publish.js manifest.json http://localhost:9998 && tsc --build && docker image inspect gristlabs/grist --format 'gristlabs/grist image present' && NODE_PATH=_build  NO_CLEANUP=1 DEBUG=1 SELENIUM_BROWSER=chrome node ./node_modules/mocha/bin/_mocha -b --no-exit -g "${GREP_TESTS}" _build/test/*.js
scripts.pretest: docker pull gristlabs/grist && tsc --build && node ./buildtools/publish.js manifest.json http://localhost:9998
scripts.grist:serve: yarn && npm run build:dev && concurrently -k "npm run serve" "npm run grist"
